name: civicshield-ledger
description: Ledger human-in-the-loop approval for CivicShield large releases (DMK + Ethereum signer).

scripts.speculos: docker run --rm -it --name civicshield-speculos -p 5001:5000 -v $PWD/.speculos:/speculos/apps ghcr.io/ledgerhq/speculos --model nanosp --display headless --api-port 5000 --seed "$(cat .speculos-seed.txt)" /speculos/apps/ethereum.elf
